news.headline: American bonds resist lower inflation trends despite weakening stock market demand.
Red Cat Holdings appoints Christian Koji Ericson as CFO, effective March 17, 2025. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) based in Salt Lake City disclosed the appointment of Christian Koji Ericson as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from March 17, 2025. The company specializes in drone technology by merging robotic hardware and software for applications in military, government, and commercial sectors.

news.headline: Bitcoin faces US selling pressure amid drop in CPI inflation. BTC/USD trades bearish at $82,400 after reaching $84,437. Core CPI falls to 3.1%, marking first decline since July 2024.BTC Daily Close shows optimism but ETFs see net outflow of $153.87 million, signaling caution among institutional investors.
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a Wall Street sell-off on March 12, with the price reaching $84,437 before reversing. The US Consumer Price Index fell below expectations at 2.8%, signaling slowing inflation. However, Wall Street trading brought selling pressure, dropping the price to $82,400. Traders highlighted the importance of the 200-day moving averages at $83,550 and $85,650. Bitcoin ETFs saw outflows of $153.87 million, with Grayscale's Bitcoin Trust offloading 641 BTC, totaling $56.45 million. Institutional investors showed caution, with GBTC holdings decreasing to 195,746 BTC worth $17.24 billion. The CPI print may influence the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision.BTC price: $82,400; $84,437US CPI: 2.8%Core CPI: 3.1%BTC outflows: $153.87 millionGBTC holdings: 195,746 BTC, $17.24 billion

news.headline: Thailand's gift card market expected to reach $2.96 billion in 2025, with annual 12.5% growth and 14.3% CAGR from 2020-2024.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Thailand Gift Card and Incentive Card Market indicates significant growth opportunities in the upcoming years. It is projected that the gift card market in Thailand will experience a steady annual increase of 12.5%, reaching a value of US$2.96 billion by 2025. The market has shown strong growth between 2020 and 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.3%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, reflecting a promising outlook for the industry. The report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for further insights and analysis.

news.headline: Cintas Corp set to release Q3 2025 results on March 26, 2025. Webcast available at www.Cintas.com, starting at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) issued a statement confirming the release date for its fiscal year 2025 third quarter results will be on March 26, 2025. A conference call is scheduled to discuss the financial outcomes, with a live webcast accessible to individual investors and the general public from 10:00 a.m., Eastern Time, on the same day. The webcast can be found on www.Cintas.com by clicking on the designated icon and following the provided instructions.

Scatec ASA launches 60 MW solar plant in Botswana as part of 120 MW project, aiming for renewable energy transition.
news.summary: Oslo and Cape Town, 12 March 2025: A renowned renewable energy provider, Scatec ASA, has initiated the commercial functioning of the initial 60 MW segment within the 120 MW Mmadinare Solar Cluster situated in Botswana.

news.headline: Canada Foreign Minister: I will speak to US Secretary of State Rubio about issues including the Ukraine ceasefire.
Dow Jones falls on surprise CPI inflation report; Nvidia, Tesla stocks rally.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones experienced a downturn following an unexpected Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. However, there were positive performances from Nvidia and Tesla stocks, which saw an increase in value on the market. This news was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Ethereum trails Bitcoin in recovery, devs focus on Pectra upgrade. Details on the new system in progress.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was highlighted that there has been a significant increase in the number of new Covid-19 cases in the country. The data shows that there were over 10,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours, raising concerns about the ongoing spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of deaths related to Covid-19 has also seen a notable rise, with more than 200 fatalities reported in the same period. This surge in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals nearing full capacity and medical resources being stretched thin. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: SOLIC Capital Advisors advises ad hoc bondholders of Exela Technologies in restructuring; Chicago-based firm offers financial services.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, SOLIC Capital Advisors, a prominent financial advisory company offering services in investment banking, restructuring, and distressed asset support, has been chosen to represent the ad hoc group of bondholders of Exela Technologies. Exela Technologies is a worldwide company specializing in business process automation.

news.headline: Factura.ai becomes Workday Innovation Partner, offering AI-driven accounts payable solution. Earns Design Approved Badge.
news.summary: Factura.ai, based in ROCKVILLE, Md., unveiled on March 12, 2025, that it has become a Workday Innovation Partner and received the Design Approved Badge. The company leverages advanced machine learning and artificial intelligence technologies to enhance the accounts payable process. This recognition highlights Factura.ai's commitment to innovation in this field.

news.headline: Omni Design Technologies expands with new design center in Austin, TX, adding to 5 other centers worldwide.
news.summary: Omni Design Technologies, a prominent provider of high-performance, low-power Swift™ data acquisition and signal-processing solutions, has revealed the establishment of a new design facility in Austin, Texas. This newly inaugurated center joins Omni Design's existing five state-of-the-art design and development centers located in Northern California, Colorado, Massachusetts, Bangalore, and Hyderabad. The decision to expand to Austin was driven by the city's rich history in circuit design, aligning seamlessly with Omni Design's strategic growth plans.

Notably, Unimarket is the sole procure-to-pay software provider included in this prestigious list.

news.summary: In March 12, 2025, in DELRAY BEACH, it was reported that the Urinary Incontinence Devices Market reached a value of US$3.82 billion in 2023. Projections indicate significant growth, with a forecasted CAGR of 11.2%. The market is expected to reach US$4.22 billion in 2024 and an impressive US$7.97 billion by 2030. news.headline: Thomas F. Moser, iconic furniture designer, dies at 90. Founded company in 1972, leaving 50-year legacy.
news.summary: In Auburn, Maine, on March 12, 2025, it was reported that Thomas F. Moser, a prominent woodworker, author, and entrepreneur, passed away on March 5, 2025 at his residence on the coast of Maine. Alongside his wife Mary, he established Thos. Moser Cabinetmakers in 1972. This marks a 50-year legacy that has laid the groundwork for their enduring success in the industry. Tom's entrepreneurship and woodworking expertise have been pivotal in shaping the company's journey.

news.headline: Chubb launches new division focusing on small & lower midmarket segments, with Rob Poliseno as President and Jason Ranucci as COO.
news.summary: Rob Poliseno has been named Division President of Small & Lower Midmarket, while Jason Ranucci has been appointed Chief Operating Officer in the same segments at a company based in Whitehouse. This organization is utilizing a digital operating model to extend Chubb's underwriting and service capabilities to small and lower middle market segments.

news.headline: Lucid Software ranked 12th globally in Okta's Businesses at Work 2025 Report, showcasing continued enterprise adoption.
news.summary: In South Jordan, Utah on March 12, 2025, Lucid Software has once again been recognized among the leading applications globally, making it the sixth consecutive year it has achieved this accolade in Okta's Businesses at Work 2025 Report. Lucid Software continues to hold the 12th spot on the list of most popular apps worldwide. This recognition highlights the company's consistent performance and relevance, as detailed in the report discussing various statistics and trends in the industry.

news.headline: Inventor from Austin, Texas develops new Automotive Security System ASP-455 to prevent vehicle theft.
news.summary: An inventor from Austin, Texas, unveiled the ANTI-THEFT FOR AUTOMOBILES in Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025. This innovative solution aims to prevent vehicle theft by enhancing security measures. The inventor expressed the goal of offering motorists a highly effective tool to combat theft incidents. The device has garnered significant interest for its potential to safeguard vehicles.

US inflation in February eased more than anticipated. Economists foresee rising prices and slower growth ahead. Fed faces challenge.
news.summary: Economic analysts are preparing for rising inflation and decreased growth rates, presenting a difficult situation for the Federal Reserve. This shift could lead to challenges as experts anticipate increased price pressures and a reduction in growth momentum.

Genmab A/S' Annual General Meeting concludes; key decisions made, including approval of financial reports and election of board members.
Research indicates high government debt may fuel inflation, imposing cost pressure on Americans with higher mortgage rates.
news.summary: Economic experts express concern that implementing deficit finance policies could lead to increased financial burdens for American households, potentially causing higher mortgage rates.

news.headline: Cruisebound reveals insights into cruise passenger demographics and booking trends in 2025 amid economic uncertainty.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Cruisebound, a rapidly expanding online cruise agency in the United States, shared data on the changing demographics and booking trends of cruise passengers. As economic instability continues, cruises emerge as a desirable travel option for many. This information sheds light on the shifting preferences and behaviors of travelers, showcasing the significance of this industry in accommodating varying consumer needs.

news.headline: YMCA USA's CEO Suzanne McCormick testifying on combating senior loneliness at Senate Committee on Aging. #SocialConnectedness
news.summary: Suzanne McCormick, the President and CEO of YMCA of the USA, emphasized the significance of social connectedness at a hearing titled "Breaking the Cycle of Senior Loneliness: Strengthening Families and Community Support" in Chicago on March 12, 2025. The hearing aims to address issues related to senior loneliness and advocate for stronger family and community support systems. McCormick's testimony highlights the importance of combating social isolation among seniors, with a focus on enhancing connections within families and communities.

news.headline: Luxury senior living community Inspīr Embassy Row in Washington D.C. launches monthly speaker series "The Exchange" featuring thought leaders.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, an ultra-luxury senior living community called Inspīr Embassy Row situated in the prestigious Embassy Row neighborhood of Washington D.C., introduced a new monthly speaker series titled "The Exchange: Expert Views, Timely Topics." This initiative aims to bring valuable insights and discussions to the residents and guests.

news.headline: NASA's SpaceX Crew-10 astronauts will conduct biomedical, physical science research on the ISS. Four crew members involved.
news.summary: Four crew members are set to participate in a cutting-edge scientific mission at the International Space Station (ISS) beginning on March 12, 2025. During this expedition, the astronauts will support a variety of groundbreaking biomedical investigations and physical science projects funded by the National Science Foundation (NSF). The research conducted as part of this mission is expected to advance scientific knowledge in various fields.

news.headline: Karolinska Development's PharmNovo gets FDA nod for Phase 2a trial of PN6047, targeting peripheral neuropathy & allodynia.
news.summary: In Stockholm today, on March 12, 2025, Karolinska Development AB shared news that portfolio company PharmNovo has received promising feedback for its leading drug candidate, PN6047. The feedback came during a pre-IND discussion with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) concerning the design of their upcoming Phase 2a clinical trial intended for treating peripheral neuropathy and allodynia. PharmNovo, a company under Karolinska Development AB listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under KDEV, is optimistic about the development of PN6047 following this positive interaction with the FDA.

news.headline: US Trade Rep: EU has rejected US efforts to deal with global excess steel and aluminum capacity-statement.
Canada Finance Minister: An early review of USMCA trade pact is not on Canada's agenda for meetings in Washington this week.
CBD market to hit $291.39B by 2032, growing at 30.6% CAGR from 2025 - Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: The market for CBD-infused products is projected to have a remarkable growth rate, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 30.6% anticipated from 2025 to 2032. This data comes from a recent market research report that focuses on the size, share, forecasts, and trends within the CBD-infused products sector. The report delves into various aspects including the sources of CBD, predominantly from hemp, and the types of products available such as edibles. The analysis highlights the increasing popularity and demand for CBD-infused goods in the market. The report was released on March 12, 2025, in Redding, California.

news.headline: Energy sector shifting to clean sources with increasing investment in renewables despite ongoing support for fossil fuels.
Sezzle revamps shopping experience with new features for smarter spending, focusing on flexibility, transparency, and savings.
news.summary: Sezzle has recently unveiled new updates aimed at improving flexibility, transparency, and savings during the checkout process. These changes are designed to provide users with a more seamless experience when making purchases online. The updates include features that offer greater control and visibility, as well as opportunities for cost savings. With these enhancements, Sezzle users can benefit from a more streamlined and efficient checkout process, leading to an improved overall shopping experience.

news.headline: Trump plans to nominate Michelle Bowman as Fed's vice chair for supervision, replacing Michael Barr. Source: Bloomberg.
news.summary: Donald Trump is expected to nominate Michelle Bowman, a Federal Reserve Governor, as the central bank's vice chair for supervision, as per Bloomberg. This decision, revealed by a reliable source, may be disclosed today, signaling a notable change in the Fed's regulatory oversight. The move follows Michael Barr's resignation from the position earlier this year due to worries about a clash with Trump. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Canada Finance Minister: Canada Ministers to visit Washington this week to speak with Trump administration, aiming to get relief from US tariffs.
US Trade Rep: EU's trade policies are out of step with reality.

XRP price rises by 6% to $2.24 after market crash. Franklin Templeton files XRP ETF, boosting odds of US approval to 76%. Onchain data suggests price bottomed, eyes V-shaped recovery to $2.64, indicating 20% gain potential. Remember, always do your own research before investing.
news.summary: XRP saw a 6% daily gain to $2.24 following a market crash, trading 18% above the daily low of $1.89. Franklin Templeton filed for an XRP ETF, boosting XRP's potential as an investment. The filing influenced speculation of significant capital inflows into XRP, potentially pushing its price into double digits. The odds of a US spot XRP ETF approval in 2025 are at 76%. XRP's onchain data, like the MVRV ratio, suggests a price bottom. XRP aims for a V-shaped recovery, eyeing a 20% gain to $2.64. Bullish momentum is strengthening with the RSI rising from 27 to 44. This news does not offer investment advice.

news.headline: Canada's gift card market to grow by 7.5% annually, reaching US$8.43 billion in 2025 with 8.0% CAGR in 2020-2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Canada Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025 Update" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The gift card market in Canada is projected to experience a 7.5% annual growth rate, reaching an estimated value of US$8.43 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the gift card market in Canada showed strong expansion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.0%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, indicating continued growth in the market.

news.headline: Mortgage rates reach lowest point since October with applications rising 11.2% last week. 30-year loan average: 6.67%.
news.summary: Mortgage rates have reached their lowest point since October of last year, with the average rate on a 30-year loan dropping to 6.67%. This significant decrease in rates led to an 11.2% increase in mortgage loan applications last week, as reported by the Mortgage Bankers Association. This marks the sixth consecutive week of declining rates, with application volume up by 31% compared to the previous year. These developments have generated much interest within the housing market.

news.headline: Highline receives CPF BOOT grant to expand fiber broadband in Liberty County, Texas, boosting high-speed access.
news.summary: In Liberty County, Texas, on March 12, 2025, it was reported that Highline secured a CPF BOOT grant to enhance high-speed fiber broadband accessibility in the region. This initiative aims to extend the reach of broadband services and reinforce Highline's presence in Liberty County.

Tesla stock rises despite 2 price-target cuts as analysts reduce delivery and earnings estimates, set to bounce.
news.summary: Despite two more price-target decreases, Tesla stock is expected to continue its upward trend. Analysts have reduced delivery and earnings estimates, reflecting a challenging outlook for the company. The stock's resilience comes despite the cuts, showcasing investor confidence. Tesla's stock rise indicates positive sentiment.

news.headline: Bitcoin may drop further, targeted at $73,000. Analysts predict bearish trend with Short BTC ETFs spike amid stalled momentum.
news.summary: A recent report indicates a slowdown in cryptocurrency momentum, particularly in bitcoin, which is predicted to decrease further. Analysts suggest the price may drop to $73,000, citing a crucial moving average as a key factor. Additionally, the surge in Short BTC ETFs reflects a growing interest in betting against bitcoin in the market.
